competitors.name: OpenAI / ChatGPT
fetched_urls: WebSearch: OpenAI ChatGPT new feature announcement July 10 2026 (ok)
WebSearch: "ChatGPT" group chats removed "no longer" create new group chat July 2026 (ok)
competitors.raw_snapshot: Tier1三源持续403，转WebSearch。较baseline（7/9记录的livestream发布）新增两条实质进展：①ChatGPT Work今日（7/10）正式开始向用户推送（预计24小时内完成），整合ChatGPT/Codex/Atlas浏览器资源，新增Scheduled Tasks（单次/按计划重复/触发式/监控变化四种运行方式）；②与此同时，自7/9起web/iOS/Android不再允许创建新group chat、不能把现有对话转为group chat、也不能通过邀请链接加入，已有group chat转为只读但保留历史消息/文件/图片，个人对话不受影响。GPT-5.6三档模型（Sol/Terra/Luna）已在ChatGPT/Codex/API全面开放（Sol面向Plus/Pro/Business/Enterprise，Terra面向Free/Go）。
competitors.content_hash: Tier1三源持续403，转WebSearch。较baseline（7/9记录的livestream发布）新增两条实质进展：①ChatGPT Work今日（7/10）正式开始向用户推送（预计24

changes.description: ChatGPT Work今日起正式推送至用户（此前为7/9 livestream宣布），整合ChatGPT/Codex/Atlas浏览器，新增可单次/按计划/触发式/监控变化运行的Scheduled Tasks
changes.evidence: 「ChatGPT Work is an agent for longer, more involved tasks that can research and analyze information, work across connected apps and files, and create finished documents, spreadsheets, presentations, reports, and Sites」「Work can also keep projects moving through Scheduled Tasks that run once, repeat on a schedule or trigger, or monitor for changes.」
changes.meee2_relevance: 推断：Scheduled Tasks的'监控变化后触发'与meee2跨工具事件感知有浅层呼应，但整体仍是单一Work agent产出交付物，非人机同一协议下的对等协作，锚点重叠有限；本次进展属于昨日alert（Shared Projects/Group Chats）的落地确认而非新结构信号

changes.description: 自7/9起ChatGPT在web/iOS/Android收紧group chats入口：不再允许创建新group chat/转换现有对话/邀请链接加入，已有group chat转为只读
changes.evidence: 「Beginning July 9, users on web, iOS, and Android will no longer be able to create new group chats, turn existing conversations into group chats, or join a group chat through an invite link.」「Existing group chats will remain available and can continue to be used for now.」
changes.meee2_relevance: 推断：这与昨日alert中'together—live'的Group Chats卖点形成收缩信号——不排除OpenAI正将多人live协作能力统一收拢进ChatGPT Work的Shared Projects而非维持独立Group Chats入口。对meee2而言是竞品'多人live协作'路径出现调整的间接情报，暂不构成新的锚点触碰，但建议下轮持续观察Work内是否吸收Group Chats能力

key_findings: ChatGPT Work今日起实际向用户推送，是昨日livestream宣布的落地确认，新增Codex/Atlas整合与Scheduled Tasks细节
同时段group chats创建入口收紧，转为只读，可能预示相关能力正整合进Work而非独立维持
GPT-5.6三档模型今日起在ChatGPT/Codex/API全面开放

competitors.name: Claude.ai / Anthropic
fetched_urls: WebSearch: Anthropic Claude new feature announcement July 10 2026 (ok)
WebSearch: Anthropic Claude Cowork web mobile expansion "remote sessions" synced files artifacts (ok)
competitors.raw_snapshot: Tier1持续403，官方一手页（claude.com/blog、support.claude.com）本次亦403，转WebSearch聚合多方交叉确认。首次完整捕获'Claude Cowork扩展至web/mobile'（TechCrunch 7/7首发，HelpNetSecurity 7/8，baseline 7/9未记录，本次首次纳入报告）：Cowork新增remote sessions（beta），session与文件保存至Claude账号、'go where you go'跨设备同步；用户可在电脑发起任务、手机查看进度、任意设备取回成品；Chat与Cowork合并为统一主页，projects与artifacts跨两者共享一处；笔记本合上后任务持续执行，无设备在线时定时任务仍可运行；本轮从Max计划开始分批推出。另确认Claude Sonnet 5已为Claude Code默认模型（1M原生上下文，$2/$10每Mtok promo价至8/31），Claude for Government进入beta（可读写邮件/日历/OneDrive/SharePoint）。baseline已记录的Claude Reflect与CHANGELOG v2.1.205本轮无新进展。
competitors.content_hash: Tier1持续403，官方一手页（claude.com/blog、support.claude.com）本次亦403，转WebSearch聚合多方交叉确认。首次完整捕获'Claude Cowork扩展至web/mobile'（TechCrunch 7/7首发

changes.description: 首次捕获Claude Cowork扩展至web/mobile：remote sessions（beta）令session与文件跨设备同步、chat与Cowork共享统一主页（projects/artifacts跨两者共享）、笔记本合上后任务持续执行，baseline未记录
changes.evidence: 「Cowork runs your sessions remotely (in beta), so your sessions and files are saved to your Claude account and go where you go, on any device.」「A user can start a task at their desk, check on its progress from a phone, and retrieve the finished output from any device.」「Chat and Cowork also share one home now, with one place for your projects and artifacts across both.」「Work continues when you close your laptop, and scheduled tasks run with no device online.」
changes.source_url: WebSearch聚合（techcrunch.com 2026/07/07 + venturebeat.com + helpnetsecurity.com 2026/07/08 交叉确认，claude.com/blog/cowork-web-mobile一手页本次403未能直连）
changes.meee2_relevance: 推断：'sessions... go where you go, on any device'与meee2锚点1（session同构、跨场景延续）方向呼应；'start a task at their desk...retrieve the finished output from any device'与锚点4（跨session/跨工具/跨owner的artifact pull）在'跨设备取回产出'层面直接呼应；'work continues even when a laptop is closed'与meee2 peripheral理念（不依赖前台设备持续运行）方向一致。三条锚点同时被不同程度触碰，是本轮观察到的最强结构信号，判定为hi级别，触发alert

key_findings: 首次完整捕获Claude Cowork web/mobile扩展，'跨设备session延续+统一artifact主页'是本轮全部竞品中结构信号最强的发现之一
确认Claude Sonnet 5已为Claude Code默认模型（1M上下文），Claude for Government进入beta
baseline已记录的Claude Reflect与CHANGELOG v2.1.205本轮无新进展

competitors.name: Raycast
fetched_urls: WebSearch: Raycast changelog new features AI agent July 10 2026 site:raycast.com (ok)
competitors.raw_snapshot: 转WebSearch。较baseline（7/9记录的Windows v0.67文件内容搜索/push-to-talk）新增两条命中：①Presets更名为Agents，配置可跨chat复用；②新增团队级共享——AI Agents/AI Commands/Dictation Styles可在组织内共享。另确认AI Chat支持编辑已发消息、Ask User Question多选提问等既有功能。均为渐进式产品功能，未见结构性定位变化。
competitors.content_hash: 转WebSearch。较baseline（7/9记录的Windows v0.67文件内容搜索/push-to-talk）新增两条命中：①Presets更名为Agents，配置可跨chat复用；②新增团队级共享——AI Age

changes.description: Presets更名为Agents（跨chat复用配置），新增团队级AI Agents/AI Commands/Dictation Styles跨组织共享
changes.evidence: 「Presets are now called Agents, and they're reused across chats, with changes to an agent's configuration applying to every chat that uses it.」「Teams can now share AI Agents, AI Commands, and Dictation Styles across the organization, making it easier to give everyone access to the same setups and work more consistently.」

key_findings: Presets更名为Agents与团队级共享是本轮唯一确认的新条目，均为渐进式功能扩展，未触及meee2差异化锚点
官方changelog feed本次仍403

competitors.name: GitHub Claude Code 生态雷达
competitors.raw_snapshot: 数据质量提示：topic:claude-code查询返回的star数（20万+，如affaan-m/ECC 228186、NousResearch/hermes-agent 212634）与其余三个查询及baseline历史量级（0-907）严重不符，两次独立WebFetch复核数值一致但无法通过直连curl交叉验证（受限于本session的GitHub API仅repo-scoped）。判断为可疑数据，本轮star数不采信、不作为威胁升级依据，仅记录仓库名称与描述本身。四查询按full_name去重合并、按活跃度（pushed_at近30天或created_at近60天）过滤后，排除baseline已提及的ComposioHQ/awesome-claude-skills、gsd-build/get-shit-done（均超30天未活跃）及已报告过的mcoquet/cockpit、iAmCorey/kooky、alchaincyf/fanbox、handmux、nashory/agent-cockpit、trevormil/TerMinal、Rurutia-Artemis/rurutia（star数无翻倍或+500跃升）。新增本轮首次纳入：juicerq/bankai（'live Claude Code sessions'+cockpit+terminal，命中4项keyword，创建于7/4极新）、thedotmack/claude-mem（跨agent持久化session记忆）、ruvnet/ruflo（meta-harness+多智能体swarm）、affaan-m/ECC（agent harness，star数存疑）、Surething-io/cockpit与alexjbarnes/cockpit（延续'files+agent+terminal cockpit'范式）。本次items全量full_name列表（供下次去重）：affaan-m/ECC, NousResearch/hermes-agent, farion1231/cc-switch, nextlevelbuilder/ui-ux-pro-max-skill, JuliusBrussee/caveman, thedotmack/claude-mem, Graphify-Labs/graphify, DietrichGebert/ponytail, addyosmani/agent-skills, Egonex-AI/Understand-Anything, shareAI-lab/learn-claude-code, rtk-ai/rtk, ruvnet/ruflo, shanraisshan/claude-code-best-practice, Leonxlnx/taste-skill, santifer/career-ops, iAmCorey/kooky, alchaincyf/fanbox, handmux/handmux, luojiahai/code-by-wire, Surething-io/cockpit, dotdevdotdev/agentwire-dev, alexjbarnes/cockpit, arikechen/ATF, nashory/agent-cockpit, trevormil/TerMinal, jiliangarette/claude-code-pane, WillBe89/gitsidian, Rurutia-Artemis/rurutia, myounghalee/cockpit, kunal-7x/claude-cockpit, juicerq/bankai, lxyer/multi-agent-collaboration-system, rayngnpc/mkcrew, mcoquet/cockpit
competitors.content_hash: 数据质量提示：topic:claude-code查询返回的star数（20万+，如affaan-m/ECC 228186、NousResearch/hermes-agent 212634）与其余三个查询及baseline历史量级（0-907

changes.description: juicerq/bankai——'面向live Claude Code sessions的终端cockpit，附带逐轮code-review层'，命中terminal/cockpit/live/session四项watch_keywords（本批最高），仓库创建于7/4，极新
changes.evidence: 「Terminal cockpit for your live Claude Code sessions, with a turn-by-turn code-review layer — openTUI on Bun」
changes.meee2_relevance: 推断：'live Claude Code sessions'+'cockpit'与meee2锚点2（live link而非snapshot）及锚点5（peripheral cockpit层）同时有浅层呼应，是本批中keyword命中密度最高的仓库，但仅1 star、创建仅6天，规模极小，仅作形态验证信号记录，不触发alert

changes.description: thedotmack/claude-mem——'跨agent的持久化session记忆'，可将Claude Code等多个agent的session操作压缩后注入未来session，命中session+agent两项keyword
changes.evidence: 「Persistent Context Across Sessions for Every Agent – Captures everything your agent does during sessions, compresses it with AI, and injects relevant context back into future sessions. Works with Claude Code, OpenClaw, Codex, Gemini, Hermes, Copilot, OpenCode + More」
changes.meee2_relevance: 推断：'Persistent Context Across Sessions'与meee2锚点1（session同构、跨场景延续）在'session记忆延续'层面有浅层呼应，但其形态是AI侧的memory注入工具，不涉及人在agent图内的对等协作，结构重叠有限；star数据来自存疑的topic:claude-code查询，暂不采信规模

changes.description: ruvnet/ruflo——'领先的agent meta-harness'，可部署multi-player swarms协调自主工作流，命中harness/swarm/agent关键词
changes.evidence: 「The leading agent meta-harness. Deploy intelligent multi-player swarms, coordinate autonomous workflows, and build conversational AI systems.」

key_findings: 重要数据质量提示：topic:claude-code查询返回的star数（20万+级别）疑似异常，与其余三查询及历史量级严重不符，本轮未采信该数值、不作为威胁升级依据
juicerq/bankai以'live sessions+cockpit+terminal'四项keyword命中密度居本批之首，但规模极小（1 star，创建仅6天）
'files+agent+terminal cockpit'范式持续有新独立作者加入（Surething-io/cockpit、alexjbarnes/cockpit），延续baseline已指出的meta信号
已报告过的mcoquet/cockpit、iAmCorey/kooky、fanbox、handmux、agent-cockpit、TerMinal、rurutia本轮star数无显著跃升，不重复报告
未发现单个仓库达到hi/crit级别的结构重叠或显著规模，本轮无alert

alerts.headline: Claude Cowork首次扩展至web/mobile：'session与文件跨设备同步'+'chat与Cowork共享统一artifact主页'+'合上笔记本任务仍持续'，是本轮结构信号最强的官方动态
alerts.evidence: 「Cowork runs your sessions remotely (in beta), so your sessions and files are saved to your Claude account and go where you go, on any device.」「A user can start a task at their desk, check on its progress from a phone, and retrieve the finished output from any device.」「Chat and Cowork also share one home now, with one place for your projects and artifacts across both.」
alerts.action_suggestion: 建议实测Cowork web/mobile版'跨设备取回产出'的具体交互（是否为live同步还是定期快照、是否支持从他人session pull），并评估meee2的peripheral菜单栏形态相较Claude的'手机作为远程控制器'路径在'不打断当前焦点'层面的差异化是否需要在传播中强化。

alerts.headline: ChatGPT Work今日起正式推送落地（昨日为livestream宣布），同时收紧Group Chats创建入口——多人live协作能力疑似正被整合进Work而非独立维持
alerts.evidence: 「ChatGPT Work is an agent for longer, more involved tasks that can research and analyze information, work across connected apps and files」「Beginning July 9, users on web, iOS, and Android will no longer be able to create new group chats, turn existing conversations into group chats, or join a group chat through an invite link.」
alerts.action_suggestion: 建议持续观察ChatGPT Work正式版是否吸收原Group Chats的'together—live'能力，以及Scheduled Tasks的触发式/监控变化运行方式是否会扩展为跨工具事件感知，作为下一轮重点复核项。
